texto: And like flowers in the fields, that make wonderful views, when we stand side-by-side in our wonderful hues..We all make a beauty so wonderfully true.We are special and different, and just the same, too!So whenever you look at your beautiful skin, from your wiggling toes to your giggling grin...Think how lucky you are that the skin you live in, so beautifully holds the "You" who's within.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Michael Tyler: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “And like flowers in the fields, that make wonderful views, when we stand side-by-side in our wond…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beautiful, color pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de color e different.
